name: privacypilot
description: Automatically generate Play Store-compliant privacy policies from AndroidManifest.xml and Gradle dependencies. Deploys to GitHub Pages.

developer_name.description: Your full name or developer display name (e.g. Your Name)

email.description: Contact email shown in the privacy policy (e.g. you@example.com)

github_username.description: GitHub username for GitHub Pages deployment (e.g. your-username)

country.description: Country where you are based (e.g. United States)
